en: Welcome to the vocab school by Manu and Tinku. We bring one new word daily for your vocabulary.
Let us see the word of the day and learn the meaning of the word.
Word of the day is recovery. We will learn the meaning of recovery.
How do you spell it? Let us spell it out for you. R-E-C-O-V-E-R-Y.
Recovery means a return to a normal state of health, mind, or strength.
For more words every day, subscribe to the vocab school
and do not forget to like and share it with friends and family.
